assertions: D10: Multi-turn chatbot conversation remains consistent, respecting same selected language.

vision_verdict: pass. The user interface is consistently presented in English throughout all elements, including headers, descriptive text, and navigation labels. The sidebar, interactive cards, and the onboarding walkthrough maintain linguistic uniformity, ensuring a seamless experience. The layout remains well-structured and organized, with all interface components clearly rendered in the selected language, displaying structural integrity and professional design alignment.
